content: Thank you for calling Acme Logistics, how can I help?
Hello, I'm calling from 0010 for tomorrow.
[en] One moment...
[en] Thanks for reaching out. Just to make sure—your MC is zero- zero- one- zero, is that correct? And what kind of equipment are you running?
No, my MC is 250819.
[en] Got it.

content: [en] All set at $3,400 for Boston to Tampa tomorrow, GLK Trucking LLC. Transfer was successful and now you can wrap up the conversation.
What?

[en] Sure thing—just to confirm, you're booked at $3,400 for LOAD- 0010, picking up tomorrow morning in Boston, delivering pharmaceuticals to Tampa. Your MC 250819 is GLK Trucking LLC. If you have any other questions or need another lane, just let me know.
Uh, do you got anything coming back? I'm running dry van out of Atlanta heading west.
Searching Atlanta westbound loads for dry van.
